top_signals.title: Gold Declines as Traders Weigh Prospects for US-Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Gold headed for a second weekly decline as traders weighed prospects for a long-awaited deal to end the US-Iran war that’s rattled global markets and stoked inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Air India Crash Investigation Report: What Went Wrong?
top_signals.summary: One year after India’s deadliest Boeing 787 crash, the final report is still delayed. Aviation Cargo Chairman, Vandana Singh, joins Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss investigation gaps, safety reforms, and what’s needed to restore public confidence in Indian aviation. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Bull and Bear Case for SpaceX
top_signals.summary: SpaceX shares are hitting the public markets on Friday after the biggest IPO of all time. Founder ETFs Partner, Michael Monaghan, sees a three-in-one opportunity for investors while True North Advisors' Dhruv Maniktala says his firm is positioning as sellers at the current valuation. They debate what's next for the company on Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Ukraine’s AI drones have given Kyiv a fresh edge on the battlefield
top_signals.summary: The latest models are more resistant to electronic jamming and have autonomous targeting capabilities that allow them to hit targets up to 150 kilometers beyond the front lines.

top_signals.title: Jette Nygaard-Andersen Joins LivaNova Board as a New Director

top_signals.title: Coinbase eyes World Cup boost as prediction markets surge: Bernstein
top_signals.summary: Bernstein says the 2026 FIFA World Cup could inject billions into prediction markets, with Coinbase and Robinhood positioned to capture a wave of new users.
